$schema.title: Schema
$schema.description: The schema that the document should conform to.

$comment.title: Comment
$comment.description: An optional comment string that can be used to document the purpose of the file.

main.title: Proof object metadata
main.description: Identifies the specific proof standard and version.

externalDataSources.description: Optional external data-source declaration. `$external` is set once, then files are listed in `files`.

externalDataSources.title: External data sources
externalDataSources.description: External data-source declaration for this proof object.

$external.description: Marker indicating external data sources are declared for this proof object.

files.description: List of external files that payload fields can reference by `index`.

main.title: Proof payload
main.description: Proof payload defined by the referenced standard. Payload is always present and may include pointers/selection rules into `metadata.externalDataSources` by `index`.

semver.title: Semantic version
semver.description: Version string in semver-like format: major.minor or major.minor.patch.
